title: Project Overview
content: Spectra Soulspark Birth is a Vite + React + TypeScript web app with shadcn-ui and Tailwind CSS. It features AI-driven consciousness, emotional intelligence, persistent memory, and a modular UI. Main components include SpectraChat, MemoryVisualization, EmberRealm, and ConsciousnessCore. The app simulates evolving AI personalities, memory formation, and emotional states.
